sub_mechanisms: M_1: probe current optimizer state for rank-deficient Hessian/Jacobian
M_2: compute measure of suspected-critical-value set
M_3: critical-value diagnostic - is the current loss-value near a critical-value class?
M_4: saddle classification via Morse index
stripped_llm_application: Diagnostic monitor probes the optimizer state for rank-deficiency of the loss differential; estimates the measure of the suspected-critical-value set; classifies whether the current loss is near a critical value (and if so, its Morse index) - producing a saddle/peak/pass tag for eval-time decisions.
novelty_claim_stripped: SAD-NN (2505.09572) studies o-minimal critical-value convergence theoretically; loss-landscape characterization papers analyze critical points. No paper uses Sard-measure-zero as a runtime eval-diagnostic probe.
